case_title: 175 BLUXOME STREET,LLC VS. GEORGE BULLOCK et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT - UNLAWFUL DETAINER FILED BY PLAINTIFF 175 BLUXOME STREET,LLC SERVED OCT-28-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BULLOCK, SUCHANDRA
